Python Backend Engineer — Acme Robotics (Kyiv)

We are hiring a senior Python backend engineer to join our Kyiv platform team. You
will design and operate the REST and async services that power our fleet-management
product, own data models in PostgreSQL, and collaborate closely with the FPV
telemetry group. This is a full-time, hybrid role based in Kyiv; Ukrainian is the
working language and most day-to-day communication happens in Ukrainian.

Required:
- 5+ years of professional Python
- Strong Django and Django REST Framework experience
- Solid PostgreSQL and SQL data-modelling skills
- Experience designing and shipping production REST APIs

Nice to have:
- Kubernetes and container orchestration
- Async Python (asyncio / FastAPI)
- Prior work with telemetry or IoT data pipelines

Compensation: 4000–6000 USD/month depending on experience. Apply via our DOU listing.
